user_focus: Improve exam-bank output integrity through five bounded agentic-loop iterations.
actual_improvements: output-integrity-audit now flags suspicious rendered question and mark-scheme PNG dimensions using existing artifact paths.
The audit now detects cross-record duplicate question image and mark-scheme image path mappings.
The audit now detects strong question/mark-scheme path-role mismatches, such as a mark-scheme-looking path assigned to question_image_path.
Suspicious rendered-crop findings now include summary buckets by image kind, reason, and paper.
Suspicious rendered-crop examples and review candidates are now severity-ranked before example_limit is applied.
evidence: tests/test_audit.py passed after each implementation step; final run: 13 passed.
Final live audit fails only on suspicious_rendered_crop_dimensions; duplicate path mapping and path-role mismatch checks pass current output.
fake_progress: No canonical PNGs were regenerated or repaired.
Dimension heuristics identify review candidates, not proven semantic contamination.
The loop did not visually inspect every ranked candidate.
bloat_introduced: src/exam_bank/audit.py gained focused helper functions for image dimensions, path mapping duplicates, role heuristics, and suspicious-crop ranking.
cleanup_required: Do not delete this run's .agent-runs artifacts if the loop audit trail is desired.
Decide separately whether .agent-runs should remain tracked or ignored; this run followed the repository's existing pattern.
Current output-integrity-audit intentionally exits 1 until the 31 suspicious rendered crops are reviewed or repaired.
agent_failure_patterns: The cycle stayed in audit/reporting after finding live suspicious crops; it did not advance into image repair.
The dirty starting worktree means this run cannot claim ownership of prior renderer/parser edits.
acceptance_criteria_pattern_that_worked_: Each iteration added one failing test in tests/test_audit.py before implementation and then ran the live output-integrity audit into the iteration folder.
next_cycle_focus: Visually inspect and repair the top ranked suspicious mark-scheme crops, starting with 13winter11_q10.
Add a small review-pack or gallery generated from suspicious_rendered_crop_review_candidates.
After repairs, rerun output-integrity-audit and ensure suspicious_rendered_crop_dimension_count drops without introducing duplicate path or role mismatch failures.
what_agent_1_should_stop_doing: Do not add more audit-only metadata before the top suspicious crops are visually inspected.
Do not broaden thresholds until the current 31 candidates are classified as true positives or acceptable long answers.
planner_policy_edits: No planner policy edits made this cycle; the current backlog already includes suspicious crop review packs and contamination detection.
